title: Peanut Butter Cookies
tagline: Three ingredients. No flour. Impossibly good.
description: The famous 3-ingredient peanut butter cookies—just peanut butter, sugar, and egg. Naturally gluten-free with intense peanut butter flavor.
ingredients: 1/2 tsp baking soda (optional, for puffier cookies)
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F. Line baking sheets with parchment.
Mix peanut butter, sugar, and egg until smooth and well combined.
Add vanilla and baking soda if using.
Roll dough into 1-inch balls. Place on baking sheets.
Press each ball with a fork in a crosshatch pattern, flattening slightly.
Bake 8-10 minutes until edges are just set. Centers will look underdone.
Cool on pan 5 minutes—they firm up as they cool. Transfer to wire rack.
notes: Peanut butter: Use regular peanut butter, not natural. Natural separates and changes the texture.
The fork marks: Traditional and functional—they help cookies bake evenly.
Don't overbake: Pull them when they look slightly underdone. They continue cooking on the pan.
Gluten-free: These are naturally gluten-free as written.
Add-ins: Press a Hershey's Kiss into each cookie right after baking for peanut butter blossoms.
